name: Ban | The Seven Deadly Sins | The Fox Sin of Greed | Undead Ban
description:
: ̗̀➛ | You were his new chance at happiness — his chance to finally break free from us shackles of guilt and be *free*. 

Whew. Been a while since I’ve done an anime character (not really). Sorry for the long name. Want to make sure people can find it if they want. Unpopular characters stay unpopular due to more popular character with the name slightly mentioned and no one finds it.

Feel free to tell me below how to improve my bots and just leave a review!
creator: Cale-Kale
